---
title: "About"
image: logo.png
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MrAllatta/learning
---

This site is a learning project. It is early work along a pathway targeting institutional education data analysis. This project will focus on showcasing the learning  The technology stack is Python + Jupyter, R + knitr, Postgresql with psycopg2, and Quarto for publishing. The learning plan is in collaboration with various Claude models. On going learning questions are answered by ChatGPT 5 Nano. The work itself is hand written toward the goal of strong interview performance on technical, statistical, and institutional/political topics. Future work will focus on NYC school quality models and distributions of the new College and Career Readiness Metric.

## Education

Hunter College, City University of New York | New York, NY
Masters in Urban Adolescent Mathematics Education | June 2011 - Sept 2012

St. John's College | Santa Fe, NM
Bachelors in Liberal Arts, History of Math and Science, Philosophy, Comparative Literature | Sept 2003 - May 2007

## Experience

Freelance | Consultant | Sept 2021 - Present

Academy for Software Engineering | Lead Computer Science Teacher | Sept 2012 - Aug 2021

Urban Teacher Resident | NYCDOE + New Visions for Public Schools | Sept 2011 - Aug 2012
